# X3 Chain Template Matrix

This directory provides local starter matrix folders for X3 Chain development.

## Included Starters

- `polkadot-sdk-l1/` - Independent L1 chain bootstrap with Polkadot SDK
- `polkadot-sdk-l2/` - Polkadot-compatible rollup/L2 bootstrap
- `papi-app/` - TypeScript/JavaScript integration starter
- `py-substrate-interface/` - Python operations/indexing automation starter
- `substrate-sdk-ios/` - Native Swift iOS integration starter

## How To Use

1. Choose the starter that matches your deliverable.
2. Follow its `docs/root/README.md` to pull the upstream template and pin version.
3. Add X3-specific wiring (chain config, RPC, signing, metrics).
4. Record final template version in project docs.
